turns.body_html:
Hello Jessica,

I would advise asking the district what documentation is going to be needed from your department in regards to this purchase?

Are these food items that need to be accounted for with production records? 
Are they a "packaged" item that is simply coming in & being handed out? Sold? 
​Is it simply a need of using the invoice from the vendor to turn in to the accounting department without actually keeping track of product? 

I can not advise you to not enter it if it's something that will have a negative impact on your department down the road. 

​Once you are confident about the impact and requirements expected there, then it will be easier for you to determine how to proceed.

turns.author: "customercare@primeroedge.com" <customercare@primeroedge.com>
turns.body_text:
Hello Carlena,  In regard to your question,  1. If you are referring to invoices reconciliation and in relations with receipt, they can be modified with restrictions as that you can change the invoice number and the amount inputted. This can be further modified if you cancel the receipt used for the order which will allow you to reinput the receipt. A big warning though as if any of the items were used in withdrawals or transfers or usage, then the process gets a bit messy.   ​   2. The reason the item cannot be received is because under the item configuration in Inventory > configuration > item and pull up the item and go to the vendor and price info tab you will see that the start date for this item to be orderable from this vendor start on 2/12 but in the image you provided the transaction date is 1/3 so it will not allow it to happen unless you change the start date to accommodate that otherwise it will not allow it to be saved       Let me know if you have questions. Thank you.          Check out PrimeroEdge Training WEBINARS Available: Click Here  SchoolCafe Training WEBINARS Available: Click Here     Let us know if you have any questions regarding this ticket by

turns.body_html:
Hello Carlena,
In regard to your question,
1. If you are referring to invoices reconciliation and in relations with receipt, they can be modified with restrictions as that you can change the invoice number and the amount inputted. This can be further modified if you cancel the receipt used for the order which will allow you to reinput the receipt. A big warning though as if any of the items were used in withdrawals or transfers or usage, then the process gets a bit messy. 
​
2. The reason the item cannot be received is because under the item configuration in Inventory > configuration > item and pull up the item and go to the vendor and price info tab you will see that the start date for this item to be orderable from this vendor start on 2/12 but in the image you provided the transaction date is 1/3 so it will not allow it to happen unless you change the start date to accommodate that otherwise it will not allow it to be saved

Let me know if you have questions. Thank you.

turns.author: Burnell Offord <bofford@slpsb.org>
turns.body_text: District called with questions on process for receipts, transfers, physical inventory count for starting in primeroedge after promotion this week with initial inventory for July entered.
turns.body_html: District called with questions on process for receipts, transfers, physical inventory count for starting in primeroedge after promotion this week with initial inventory for July entered.

turns.author: agent:22034350878
turns.body_text: School has only been doing receipt without orders:
turns.body_html: School has only been doing receipt without orders:

turns.author: "customercare@primeroedge.com" <customercare@primeroedge.com>
turns.body_text:
Hello Burnell,     Pleasure speaking with you.  To quickly recap, as you were just promoted and you are trying to update / backtrack on inventory in the system since entering your July Period inventory for the Commodity items coming from the state site.  Since you are also entering Transfers weekly to sites (and there is no Distributions to do for orders placed), andyour district is set to not allow negative QOH transfers so thus need QOH to enter, and this is for items with the Commodity Warehouse at the state (vendor LDAF), based on other entries seen with your district schools you can use the Receipt without order for the day items picked up from State, then Transfers to sites for that week when it was transferred out, and then after the month Receipt/Transfers entered you would do you Physical Inventory for August.     Before you close/reconcile your Physical Inventory for August, it would be recommended to verify it is appearing as you need and you advised you may call us again to review.  There is also the training site where you can test something if you have a question as well without affecting your live data: https://online5uat.primeroedge.com/     You are welcome to reply here for additional questions or call us at 1.866.442.6030 M-F 6a-6p CST and reference this ticket 314508. training courses in the Primeroedge Academy

  4. Log out and log back in, then check the Receipts w/o Orders page to verify that the prices are rounding to 2 decimals.





Please follow the above steps and let us know if you require any further assistance.
